name: hadf-signature-expansion

cu_v2.rationale: Schema v1.1 migration + reader/attester calibration_status logic + on-device harness + cloud calibrator across .claude/shared/hadf catalogs (additive; no high-risk Swift files per review). Empirical-first calibration_status honesty layer is moderately novel (generalizes Sub-exp 2). Verification non-trivial: real M4 on-device calibration + K2 generalization check + RQ5 tight-cluster pathology finding, 19 tests. B_medium: infra/research, additive surface, below A_high line. (Populated 2026-06-07 during post-merge state-drift reconciliation; operator may recalibrate.)

T4_m4_calibration.k2_verdict: PASS — method generalizes M2->M4 and discriminates them (0.095 vs 0.179s)

empirical_findings.single_shot_attestation_limit: tight on-device clusters (apple_m4 ttft var 0.0002) suffer the Mahalanobis tight-cluster pathology — single-shot attestation unreliable (RQ5, expected). Distribution-level centroids ARE distinct (the recognition claim holds).
